upstream_note: v2: full 6x6. Top-level cells are the openai-egress row for v1 compatibility; the full grid is under upstreams.<egress>.cells keyed by ingress dialect.
egress_configured: openai openai-responses anthropic gemini cohere bedrock
capability_note: advisory context only (probe-first: every cell is probed regardless): Portkey's /v1/messages route serves only providers that implement a messages config (anthropic, bedrock, vertex-anthropic, azure-ai-inference at v1.15.2; openai/google/cohere throw 'messages is not supported by <provider>', transformToProviderRequest.ts:158), and it has no chat-to-Responses bridge; other cells are grey by that capability limit

openai.verdict_note: HTTP 200, passthrough (same dialect, no translation required); round trip to the mock's openai endpoint confirmed

openai-responses.verdict_note: UNTRANSLATED passthrough mock canned openai-responses body (sentinel id present); the gateway proxied /v1/responses through verbatim instead of translating (HTTP 200)
openai-responses.probe_note: probe failed: HTTP 200; response was the upstream's openai-responses body proxied verbatim, not a translation (passthrough mock canned openai-responses body (sentinel id present))

hardware: AWS m7g.4xlarge (Graviton3, 16 cores / 64 GB). Gateway-under-test pinned to 4 cores (the comparable basis); mock and load generator on 6 cores each so the mock never bottlenecks the streaming sweep. Ubuntu 24.04. One dedicated box per gateway.
